title: feat(catalog): NCAAB 1H/2H period market type availability
root_cause: NCAAB had no sport_market_type_availability rows for period/half market types. Cross-sport (sport_id=NULL) SGO aliases from UTV2-700 already covered the provider keys, so only availability rows were needed.

fix.change: Added 6 sport_market_type_availability rows for NCAAB: 1h_moneyline, 1h_spread, 1h_total_ou, 2h_moneyline, 2h_spread, 2h_total_ou. No new aliases required.

runtime_change_note: Pure data migration. No schema changes, no code changes. NCAAB 1H/2H period offers will now resolve to canonical market_type_ids via existing cross-sport aliases.

db_verification.query: SELECT sport_id, market_type_id FROM sport_market_type_availability WHERE sport_id = 'NCAAB' AND market_type_id IN ('1h_moneyline','1h_spread','1h_total_ou','2h_moneyline','2h_spread','2h_total_ou')
